Concepts.Label: natural-language vocabulary
Concepts.Description: Maps free-form English to constraint signals the deterministic resolver executes. Each Cue carries Trigger synonyms (the vocabulary) and a Signal (the action). The TLM IS the model: add a synonym here and the resolver understands it - no code change. Numbers/classes/chars are bound from context by the resolver, never invented.

Concepts.Label: class minimum
Concepts.Description: Require at least N of a class.

Concepts.Label: class maximum
Concepts.Description: Allow at most N of a class.

Concepts.Label: exact count
Concepts.Description: Require exactly N of a class.

Concepts.Label: length
Concepts.Description: Set output length (exact, min, max, or range).

Concepts.Label: restrict classes
Concepts.Description: Limit which classes may appear.

Concepts.Label: exclude chars
Concepts.Description: Forbid a class or specific characters.

Concepts.Label: include chars
Concepts.Description: Require a class or specific characters.

Concepts.Label: no ambiguous
Concepts.Description: Remove visually confusable characters.

Concepts.Label: at least
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal q.min); triggers: at least / minimum / min / at minimum / no fewer than / no less than / or more.

Properties.Triggers: at least / minimum / min / at minimum / no fewer than / no less than / or more

Concepts.Label: at most
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal q.max); triggers: at most / no more than / no greater than / up to / maximum / max / at maximum / or fewer / or less.

Properties.Triggers: at most / no more than / no greater than / up to / maximum / max / at maximum / or fewer / or less

Concepts.Label: exactly
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal q.exact); triggers: exactly / precisely.

Properties.Triggers: exactly / precisely

Concepts.Label: characters
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal target.length); triggers: characters / character / chars / char / long / in length / length.

Properties.Triggers: characters / character / chars / char / long / in length / length

Concepts.Label: of each
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal each.min); triggers: of each / of each type / of each kind / of each class.

Properties.Triggers: of each / of each type / of each kind / of each class

Concepts.Label: only
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal only); triggers: only / just / nothing but.

Properties.Triggers: only / just / nothing but

Concepts.Label: letters
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal only.uppercase+lowercase); triggers: letters / alphabetic / alphabetical / mixed case / mixed-case / upper and lower / both cases.

Properties.Triggers: letters / alphabetic / alphabetical / mixed case / mixed-case / upper and lower / both cases

Concepts.Label: alphanumeric
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal only.uppercase+lowercase+numeric); triggers: alphanumeric / alphanumerics / letters and numbers / letters and digits / numbers and letters / digits and letters.

Properties.Triggers: alphanumeric / alphanumerics / letters and numbers / letters and digits / numbers and letters / digits and letters

Concepts.Label: digits only
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal only.numeric); triggers: digits only / numbers only / numeric only / only digits / only numbers / just digits / just numbers.

Properties.Triggers: digits only / numbers only / numeric only / only digits / only numbers / just digits / just numbers

Concepts.Label: symbols only
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal only.symbol); triggers: symbols only / only symbols / special only.

Properties.Triggers: symbols only / only symbols / special only

Concepts.Label: lowercase only
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal only.lowercase); triggers: lowercase only / only lowercase / all lowercase.

Properties.Triggers: lowercase only / only lowercase / all lowercase

Concepts.Label: uppercase only
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal only.uppercase); triggers: uppercase only / only uppercase / all uppercase / all caps.

Properties.Triggers: uppercase only / only uppercase / all uppercase / all caps

Concepts.Label: pin
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal preset.pin); triggers: pin / pin code / pincode / passcode.

Properties.Triggers: pin / pin code / pincode / passcode

Concepts.Label: no ambiguous
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal no_ambiguous); triggers: no ambiguous / unambiguous / readable / no look-alikes / no look alikes / no lookalikes / no confusing / no confusables / no confusable characters / avoid confusing / easy to read / legible / memorable.

Properties.Triggers: no ambiguous / unambiguous / readable / no look-alikes / no look alikes / no lookalikes / no confusing / no confusables / no confusable characters / avoid confusing / easy to read / legible / memorable

Concepts.Label: exclude
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal exclude); triggers: exclude / excluding / without / avoid / omit / drop / remove / skip / no.

Properties.Triggers: exclude / excluding / without / avoid / omit / drop / remove / skip / no

Concepts.Label: include
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal include); triggers: include / including / must contain / contains / containing / with / plus / add / allow / use.

Properties.Triggers: include / including / must contain / contains / containing / with / plus / add / allow / use

Concepts.Label: start with
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal unsupported:character position (start/end) is not expressible); triggers: start with / starts with / begin with / begins with / first character / first char / end with / ends with / last character / last char.

Properties.Triggers: start with / starts with / begin with / begins with / first character / first char / end with / ends with / last character / last char

Concepts.Label: no repeat
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal unsupported:no-repeat / all-unique characters); triggers: no repeat / no repeats / no repeated / no repeating / non-repeating / unique characters / all unique / no duplicate / no duplicates.

Properties.Triggers: no repeat / no repeats / no repeated / no repeating / non-repeating / unique characters / all unique / no duplicate / no duplicates

Concepts.Label: pronounceable
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal unsupported:pronounceable output); triggers: pronounceable / easy to pronounce.

Properties.Triggers: pronounceable / easy to pronounce

Concepts.Label: passphrase
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal unsupported:word/passphrase output (this is character-based)); triggers: passphrase / pass phrase / random words / diceware / word-based / dictionary words.

Properties.Triggers: passphrase / pass phrase / random words / diceware / word-based / dictionary words

Concepts.Label: hexadecimal
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal unsupported:custom alphabet like hex or base64); triggers: hexadecimal / hex string / base64 / base 64.

Properties.Triggers: hexadecimal / hex string / base64 / base 64
Properties.Signal: unsupported:custom alphabet like hex or base64

Concepts.Label: only characters
Concepts.Description: Cue (signal unsupported:a custom character set (use class limits, or exclude/include specific characters instead)); triggers: only characters / only these characters / only the characters / only those characters / custom alphabet / character whitelist / from the character set / only from these characters / restricted to these characters.

Properties.Triggers: only characters / only these characters / only the characters / only those characters / custom alphabet / character whitelist / from the character set / only from these characters / restricted to these characters
Properties.Signal: unsupported:a custom character set (use class limits, or exclude/include specific characters instead)
